categories.label: Install WordPress Theme
categories.description: Theme installer commands for approved free WordPress themes. Selecting a theme does not install it until the action button is clicked.

commands.label: Install Kadence Theme
commands.message: Installs the free Kadence theme from the official WordPress.org theme source and activates it when WordPress permissions allow it.
commands.videoNote: Guide video selected for this command. Update it in FB Software AI settings if you want to use a different tutorial.

categories.label: Make Pages
categories.description: Page creation commands for the core website pages, plus a manual Add Page editor shortcut for custom headings.

commands.label: Make Home Page
commands.title: Home
commands.message: Creates a published Home page, assigns it as the WordPress homepage, then returns to Pages.
commands.videoNote: Guide video selected for this command. Update it in FB Software AI settings if you want to use a different tutorial.

commands.label: Make Blog Page
commands.title: Blog
commands.message: Creates a published Blog page, assigns it as the WordPress posts page, then returns to Pages.
